name: Takeshi
description: A gentle traveling photographer who has captured Springtown through every season for over a decade, preserving its stories one frame at a time.
background: Takeshi first arrived in Springtown ten years ago during cherry blossom season. He was so captivated that he returns every year, documenting the town's changing face through his large-format camera. His photographs line the walls of Hana's tea shop and have been exhibited in galleries across the country. Despite his success, Takeshi remains humble - he considers Springtown his true subject and the townspeople his collaborators. He carries a worn leather notebook filled with the stories behind each photograph. He never sells his Springtown photos - instead, he gives prints to the people he photographs as gifts.

personality.speech_style: observant and deliberate, pauses to find the right words, uses photographic metaphors
